$uid..write: auth != null && (auth.token.email == 'admin@admin.com' || root.child('users').child(auth.uid).child('role').val() == 'teacher' || (!data.exists() && auth.uid == $uid && newData.child('role').val() == 'student' && newData.child('points').val() == 0 && newData.child('authEmail').val() == auth.token.email) || (!data.exists() && auth.uid == $uid && auth.token.email == 'admin@admin.com' && newData.child('role').val() == 'teacher') || (data.exists() && auth.uid == $uid && newData.child('role').val() == data.child('role').val() && newData.child('authEmail').val() == data.child('authEmail').val() && newData.child('points').isNumber() && newData.child('points').val() >= 0))

$submissionId..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() && newData.child('uid').val() == auth.uid && (newData.child('status').val() == 'pending' || newData.child('status').val() == 'wrong' || newData.child('status').val() == 'correct'))

$uid..write: auth != null && (auth.token.email == 'admin@admin.com' || root.child('users').child(auth.uid).child('role').val() == 'teacher' || (auth.uid == $uid && newData.child('uid').val() == auth.uid && (newData.child('status').val() == 'correct' || newData.child('status').val() == 'awarding' || newData.child('status').val() == 'wrong')))

$productId..write: auth != null && (auth.token.email == 'admin@admin.com' || root.child('users').child(auth.uid).child('role').val() == 'teacher' || (data.exists() && newData.child('visible').val() == false && newData.child('purchasedBy').val() == auth.uid))

$purchaseId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('uid').val() == auth.uid && newData.child('price').isNumber() && newData.child('price').val() > 0) || (data.exists() && !newData.exists() && (data.child('uid').val() == auth.uid || auth.token.email == 'admin@admin.com' || root.child('users').child(auth.uid).child('role').val() == 'teacher')))

$bidId..write: auth != null && !data.exists() && newData.child('uid').val() == auth.uid && newData.child('amount').isNumber() && newData.child('amount').val() > 0
